posts.title: SystemVerilog学习之Events、Semaphores、Mailbox
posts.text: Semaphores是什么？Semaphores是信号量， 可以用来控制同时访问特定资源的线程数量，通过协调各个线程，以保证合理的使用资源 为什么需要Semaphores？当多个线程访问同一资源的时候，而这个资源只允许一个线程访问的时候，就可以用Semaphores来进行控制；如果把资源比作为一个仓库的话，Semaphores就相当于一把钥匙，每个线程需要拿到钥匙后才能对资源进行访问。当然也可以有多把钥匙，对应同一资源可以同时被访问的最大数量。 怎么使用Semaphores？1234semaphore_name.new() // 创建信号量semaphore_name.get() // 方法用来从信号量中获取keys,若没有获得指定数量的Keys,那么这个进程将会被堵塞住，直到获得指定数量的Keys.semaphore_name.put() // 返还信号量中keys semaphore_name.try_get() // 从一个信号量获取指定数量的Keys Example123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051525354class bridge; semaphore key;//声明一个旗语钥匙 function new (); this.key=new(4);//实例化1把钥匙 endfunction task go_on(string name); $display("@%0t: %s wants to go trough the brdige",$time,name); key.get();//拿到钥匙 #1ns; $display("@%0t: %s gets permission to go trough the brdige",$time,name); #10ns; endtask task go_off(string name); $display("@%0t: %s goes off the brdige",$time,name); key.put();//放回钥匙 #1ns; $display("@%0t: %s returned the key.",$time,name); endtaskendclass program test; bridge brg; string name1="Person1"; string name2="Person2"; string name3="Person3"; string name4="Person4"; initial begin brg=new(); fork begin brg.go_on(name1); brg.go_off(name1); end begin brg.go_on(name2); brg.go_off(name2); end begin brg.go_on(name3); brg.go_off(name3); end begin brg.go_on(name4); brg.go_off(name4); end join endendprogram 输出 12345678910111213141516@0: Person1 wants to go trough the brdige@0: Person2 wants to go trough the brdige@0: Person3 wants to go trough the brdige@0: Person4 wants to go trough the brdige@1000: Person1 gets permission to go trough the brdige@1000: Person2 gets permission to go trough the brdige@1000: Person3 gets permission to go trough the brdige@1000: Person4 gets permission to go trough the brdige@11000: Person1 goes off the brdige@11000: Person2 goes off the brdige@11000: Person3 goes off the brdige@11000: Person4 goes off the brdige@12000: Person1 returned the key.@12000: Person2 returned the key.@12000: Person3 returned the key.@12000: Person4 returned the key

posts.title: Linux 环境搭建
posts.text: 更换清华源1234sudo apt-get install vimsudo cp /etc/apt/sources.list /etc/apt/sources.list.baksudo vim /etc/apt/sources.listsudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get upgrade 12345678deb https://mirrors.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/ubuntu/ focal main restricted universe multiverse#deb-src https://mirrors.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/ubuntu/ focal main restricted universe multiversedeb https://mirrors.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/ubuntu/ focal-updates main restricted universe multiverse#deb-src https://mirrors.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/ubuntu/ focal-updates main restricted universe multiversedeb https://mirrors.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/ubuntu/ focal-backports main restricted universe multiverse#deb-src https://mirrors.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/ubuntu/ focal-backports main restricted universe multiversedeb https://mirrors.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/ubuntu/ focal-security main restricted universe multiverse#deb-src https://mirrors.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/ubuntu/ focal-security main restricted universe multiverse multiverse 配置git1sudo apt install git 配置用户 123git config --listgit config --global user.name [username]git config --global user.email [email] 生成ssh秘钥 1ssh-keygen 安装ZSH12345678910111213141516171819# 安装zshsudo apt-get install zsh# 内网安装# 下载文件git clone https://github.com/ohmyzsh/ohmyzsh# 若因为网速问题，无法抵达可以用我搬运至码云的链接下载git clone https://gitee.com/jasonli0012/ohmyzsh# 赋予安装脚本可执行权限cd ohmyzsh/toolschmod +x install.sh# 安装./install.shrm -rf /home/ray/.oh-my-zsh./install.sh# 设置为默认终端chsh -s /bin/zsh 设置主题123456789101112# 配置皮肤sudo gedit ~/.zshrcsudo vim ~/.zshrcsource ~/.zshrc# 在文本中找到内容ZSH-THEME修改其后值为所选主题# 主题目录 ~/ohmyzsh/themes#安装pk10git clone --depth=1 https://gitee.com/romkatv/powerlevel10k.git ${ZSH_CUSTOM:-$HOME/.oh-my-zsh/custom}/themes/powerlevel10kvim ~/.zshrcZSH_THEME="powerlevel10k/powerlevel10k"ZSH_THEME="ys" 主题123456789101112131415161718192021222324den.zsh-theme darkblood.zsh-theme gallois.zsh-theme kennethreitz.zsh-theme norm.zsh-theme 下载安装1sudo dpkg -i sogoupinyin_版本号_amd64.deb 安装依赖12sudo apt install libqt5qml5 libqt5quick5 libqt5quickwidgets5 qml-module-qtquick2sudo apt install libgsettings-qt1 安装谷歌浏览器下载安装1sudo dpkg -i google-chrome-stable_current_amd64.deb 安装Clash，科学上网下载Linux X64版本的Clash，下载地址 解压1tar -zvxf 安装包 运行cwf，启动 clash for windows1setsid ./cwf 导入节点配置Ubuntu的Network Proxy成下图所示1Seetings -> Network -> Network Proxy 关闭终端在后台运行程序1setsid ./app 安装VScode下载安装1sudo dpkg -i code_1.79.2-1686734195_amd64.deb 打开VScode1code . 调节标题栏颜色12设置搜索 : titlestyle选择： custom 安装WPS下载安装1sudo dpkg -i wps-office_11.1.0.11698_amd64.deb 安装飞书1sudo dpkg -i Feishu-linux_x64-6.1.12.deb 安装Zotero123sudo mkdir /opt/zotero./set_launcher_iconln -s /opt/zotero/zotero.desktop ~/.local/share/applications/zotero.desktop 安装SMPlayer播放器123sudo add-apt-repository ppa:rvm/smplayer sudo apt-get update sudo apt-get install smplayer smplayer-themes smplayer-skins 安装截屏软件设置快捷方式Settings-> Keyboard Shortcuts 安装Ulauncher1sudo add-apt-repository ppa:agornostal/ulauncher && sudo apt update && sudo apt install ulauncher

posts.title: Linux安装DVT
posts.text: 下载解压 免安装，直接复制 dvt_eclipse 到安装路径，我在 usr/ 下面新建了 app dir 1cp ./dvt_eclipse /usr/app 复制 license 到 dvt_eclipse 12cd license_dircp ./dvt.lic /usr/app/dvt_eclipse/licenses 打 jar patch 12mv ro.amiq.dvt.batch-20.1.40.jar ./usr/app/dvt_eclipse/batch/ro.amiq.dvt.batch-20.1.40.jarmv ro.amiq.dvt.flclient-2.8.jar ./usr/app/dvt_eclipse/batch/libs/ro.amiq.dvt.flclient-2.8.jar 设置环境变量 12345export DVT_HOME=/usr/app/dvt_eclipseexport DVT_LICENSE_FILE=$DVT_HOME/licenses/dvt.licexport DVT_HOME=/usr/app/dvt_eclipseexport PATH=$DVT_HOME/bin/:$PATHalias dvt="dvt.sh &"
